job_description: We are seeking a skilled and motivated Software Engineer (Full Stack) to join our team in Chennai. The ideal candidate will have 2–5 years of experience and a strong foundation in both front-end and back-end development. In this role, you will design, develop, test, and maintain scalable web applications while collaborating closely with designers, product managers, and fellow developers to deliver high-quality software solutions. You will be responsible for writing clean, efficient, and reusable code, troubleshooting and debugging issues, and enhancing existing systems to improve performance and reliability. Candidates should hold a degree in Computer Science or a related field and demonstrate proficiency in JavaScript, HTML, and CSS, along with experience in frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue.js, and backend technologies like Node.js, Java, or Python. Familiarity with RESTful APIs, database systems such as MySQL or MongoDB, and version control tools like Git is essential. Additional advantages include experience with cloud platforms like AWS or Azure, knowledge of DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines, and exposure to Agile methodologies. Strong problem-solving skills, effective communication, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment are key to success in this role, which offers competitive compensation, health benefits, flexible working hours, and opportunities for professional growth.
